arts.ttl: ‘Runs all day’ - Man United’s exciting message about £42m target as Rasmus Hojlund replaced
arts.sum: Manchester United, Liverpool and Chelsea have all been linked with one youngster that's caught the eye of Ruben Amorim - and Rasmus Hojlund has also had his say

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'make contact' over a deal for Barcelona centre-back
arts.sum: Manchester United allegedly make contract with Barcelona to discuss a possible deal for centra defender Andreas Christensen.

arts.ttl: Man Utd sent Garnacho message as Napoli agree terms with Kvaratskhelia heir
arts.sum: Manchester United may not lose Alejandro Garnacho to Napoli after all, with the Italian side having now agreed terms with Lille winger Edon Zhegrova, according to French media. Man Utd fans will breathe a sigh of relief at the news coming out of France that Napoli have agreed personal terms with a winger who is not Garnacho.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville believes Ruben Amorim is copying Sir Alex Ferguson by 'targeting' Man Utd duo
arts.sum: Former Manchester United defender and Sky Sports pundit Gary Neville has a theory behind the speculation linking both Marcus Rashford and Alejandro Garnacho with a move this month

arts.ttl: Arsenal legend names Man Utd's Amad as one of Premier League's best three youngsters
arts.sum: Emmanuel Petit has picked out the players he thinks are the competition's most exciting prospects

arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool now set to submit £33.6m bid to sign player Ruben Amorim wants at Manchester United
Ruben Amorim sets challenge for Man Utd players against Southampton
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim expects to learn a lot about his Man Utd players when they host Southampton.

arts.ttl: Ex-Cardiff City and Southampton footballer jailed for waving knife at neighbour
arts.sum: Benjamin Savage, 47, also played for Wimbledon before injury ended his career and led him on a path to drug addiction

arts.ttl: 'Worried' - Bruno Fernandes has already shared a concern Manchester United fans may agree with
arts.sum: Man United will be expected to get the job done against Southampton at Old Trafford on Thursday night without too much fuss.

arts.ttl: “You can’t even imagine” – January move to Manchester United ‘a dream’ as announcement on way
arts.sum: Paraguayan youngster Diego León has admitted his move to Manchester United seems like a dream. The 17-year-old has been speaking to GEN in Paraguay, relayed by Versus, about his impending move to Manchester United.
